briefdescription.para: Find the state descriptor for a given state.

simplesect.para: Descriptor, or NULL if not found.

briefdescription.para: Invoke the on_exit callback for a state.
Invoke the on_enter callback for a state.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_FSM *fsm, const SYN_FSM_Transition *transitions, SYN_FSM_State initial, const char *tag)
memberdef.name: syn_fsm_init

briefdescription.para: Set optional state name strings for debug/logging.

parameterdescription.para: Array of state name strings, indexed by state value. Must cover all state values used in the transition table.

briefdescription.para: Set the user context pointer passed to guards and actions.

detaileddescription.para:
Scans the transition table for a matching (current_state, event) pair. If a guard exists and returns false, the transition is skipped and the next matching row is tried. On a successful match:
Exit action for the current state (if state_descs set)
Transition action
State change
Entry action for the new state (if state_descs set)

simplesect.para: true if a transition was taken, false if no match found.

briefdescription.para: Force-set the FSM to a specific state.

detaileddescription.para: Fires exit action for the old state and entry action for the new state (if state_descs are set). No transition action is called.
